projects.title: Judge Sentencing Analysis
projects.description: Data-driven exploration of judicial sentencing patterns across courts and case types. Surfaces tendencies, outliers, and disparities to support legal research.

projects.title: Credit Card Optimizer
projects.description: Recommends the best credit card to use for any given purchase based on category, merchant, and reward structure. Live and in daily use.

projects.title: Case Tracker
projects.description: A focused workspace for tracking ongoing legal cases — deadlines, parties, filings, and the small details that get lost between them.

projects.title: Courtroom Simulation
projects.description: Interactive courtroom scenario practice for law students. Roleplay procedures, examine witnesses, and pressure-test arguments before they matter.

projects.title: This Portfolio
projects.description: The site you're reading. Hand-built in HTML, CSS, and vanilla JS. No frameworks, no build step — just files served from GitHub Pages.
